  • Method Details

    • content

      public Blob.Builder content(byte[] content)
      Sets the in-memory blob payload.
      Parameters:
      content - the blob bytes

    • size

      public Blob.Builder size(long size)
      Sets the blob size in bytes.
      Parameters:
      size - the content length in bytes

    • key

      public Blob.Builder key(String key)
      Sets the provider object key.
      Parameters:
      key - the blob key within the bucket

    • lastModified

      public Blob.Builder lastModified(LocalDateTime lastModified)
      Sets the last-modified timestamp.
      Parameters:
      lastModified - the last modification time in UTC

    • encoding

      public Blob.Builder encoding(String encoding)
      Sets the provider-reported content encoding.
      Parameters:
      encoding - the content encoding

    • etag

      public Blob.Builder etag(String etag)
      Sets the provider ETag, typically an identifier for a specific version of the blob content.
      Parameters:
      etag - the ETag value

    • userMetadata

      public Blob.Builder userMetadata(Map<String,String> userMetadata)
      Sets user-defined metadata entries.
      Parameters:
      userMetadata - the metadata map

    • publicURI

      public Blob.Builder publicURI(URI publicURI)
      Sets the provider-specific blob URI.
      Parameters:
      publicURI - the blob URI

    • bucket

      public Blob.Builder bucket(String bucket)
      Sets the owning bucket or container name.
      Parameters:
      bucket - the bucket name

    • expires

      public Blob.Builder expires(LocalDateTime expires)
      Sets the blob expiry timestamp.
      Parameters:
      expires - the expiry timestamp in UTC

      public Blob build()
